name: CommSec
asxFeeDesc: $5 up to $1k; $10 up to $3k; $19.95 up to $10k; $29.95 up to $25k; 0.12% above (online, settled to CDIA)
notes: Lowest tiers require settlement to a CDIA or margin loan; settling to another bank account costs more. CHESS-sponsored. No monthly fee.

name: nabtrade
usFeeDesc: Same tiers as ASX in AUD, plus FX
notes: FX spread 0.50%–0.80% depending on trade (worst case recorded). CHESS-sponsored ASX; international custodial. No monthly fee.

name: CMC Markets Invest
asxFeeDesc: $0 on first buy up to $1k per security per day (buys only); otherwise $11 or 0.10%, whichever is greater
notes: The famous $0 tier is buys only, one security per day, up to $1k. CHESS-sponsored ASX; international custodial. No monthly fee.

name: Bell Direct
asxFeeDesc: $5 up to $1k; $10 up to $3k; $15 up to $10k; $25 up to $25k; 0.10% above
notes: Tiered rates require settlement to Bell's Direct Investment Account. Frequent-trader discounts from the 11th trade each month. CHESS-sponsored.

name: Vanguard Personal Investor
asxFeeDesc: $9 flat for ASX shares (ASX 300) and Vanguard ETF sells; $0 on Vanguard ETF buys
monthlyFeeDesc: 0.10% p.a. on ASX direct shares only
notes: Custodial (no individual HIN). ASX only. $0 brokerage buying Vanguard ETFs; account fee applies to direct shares only. Official fees page is JS-rendered; cross-checked from three current review sites.

name: Stake
asxFeeDesc: A$3 per trade up to A$30,000; 0.01% of trade value above
usFeeDesc: US$3 per trade up to US$30,000; 0.01% above

promo.text: $10 trading credit for funding your AU account and a free US stock for funding your US account within 24 hours of opening
promo.conditions: Fund within 24 hours of account opening. Seen on a comparison site (Mar 2026), not on Stake's own pricing page — confirm before relying on it

notes: FX fee is 55 bps charged on AUD/USD transfers only (min US$2), not per US trade. Optional Stake Black subscription ~A$14–20/mo. ASX holdings CHESS-sponsored; US holdings custodial.

name: Selfwealth (by Syfe)
asxFeeDesc: A$9.50 flat per trade, any size
usFeeDesc: US$9.50 flat per trade; HK trades HK$88 flat
notes: Acquired by Syfe (May 2025), still open to AU retail with unchanged pricing. FX fee not displayed on pricing page. Optional Premium A$29/mo. CHESS-sponsored under your own HIN.

name: Superhero
asxFeeDesc: A$2 per trade up to A$20,000; 0.01% above
usFeeDesc: US$2 per trade up to US$20,000; 0.01% above
notes: Custodial: ASX shares held by Superhero Nominees (beneficial ownership), not CHESS-sponsored. 50 bps FX on transfers, nil per-trade FX.

name: Pearler
asxFeeDesc: A$6.50 flat per trade; A$5.50 with prepay credit packs
usFeeDesc: A$6.50 flat per trade (charged in AUD)
notes: ASX shares/ETFs CHESS-sponsored; US holdings custodial. Prepay packs save A$1 per trade. Micro-investing product A$2/mo separate.

name: Sharesies (AU)
asxFeeDesc: 1.9% of order value, capped at A$6
usFeeDesc: 1.9% of order value, capped at US$5; NZ orders capped at NZ$25
monthlyFeeDesc: Optional plans A$5–$20/mo that pre-cover a set amount of orders
notes: Custodial (Sharesies Nominee), not CHESS-sponsored. Wallet interest at RBA cash rate minus 0.25%.

name: Webull
asxFeeDesc: 0.03% (min A$1); ASX ETFs $0 brokerage
usFeeDesc: US$0 commission on US shares and ETFs

promo.text: Up to 100,000 bonus Qantas Points when switching to Webull (1 point per A$1 on eligible balances)
promo.conditions: New/switching customers; based on eligible deposits and transfers; ends 30 Sep 2026; T&Cs apply

notes: ASX holdings CHESS-sponsored (own HIN); US/HK custodial. US$0 commission current since April 2026. Optional streaming data subscriptions extra.

name: Moomoo
asxFeeDesc: 0.03% (min A$3, GST incl.)

promo.text: Up to 38 free fractional shares (pool incl. NVIDIA/Apple/Tesla) plus 30 days of $0 brokerage on AU and US stocks
promo.conditions: New AU clients (SA residents excluded); tiered by deposit ($1k/$3k/$8k); balance must be maintained 30 days; ends 31 Jul 2026

notes: CHESS-sponsored ASX (own HIN). $0 subscription and inactivity fees. FX margin not disclosed on pricing page.

name: Tiger Brokers
asxFeeDesc: 0.03% (min A$3, GST incl.)
usFeeDesc: US$2 up to 200 shares/order, then US$0.01/share

promo.text: Welcome offer: $20 trading credit on any deposit, 4 zero-brokerage trades per month, and no FX fees on the first A$2,000 exchanged monthly
promo.conditions: New clients; free trades waive minimum brokerage only. Confirmed via comparison sites (Jul 2026) — Tiger's own promo pages blocked automated checks; confirm on sign-up

notes: Now CHESS-sponsored with unique HIN (migrated from custodial). Fees cross-checked from two review sites; official site blocked automated fetches.

name: eToro
asxFeeDesc: US$2 per trade (≈A$3, charged in USD); ETFs $0 commission
notes: Custodial, not CHESS-sponsored; USD-denominated account. AUD conversion fee varies (~1.5%, reduced to 0.75% with a recurring investment plan) — biggest cost for AU users. US$10/mo inactivity fee after 12 months. SMSF cashback offer exists for SMSF accounts only (not listed as a retail promo).

name: Interactive Brokers
asxFeeDesc: 0.08% (min A$6) on fixed pricing; cheaper tiered pricing for volume
notes: Custodial for ASX (no HIN). FX at near-interbank rate + 0.002% commission — by far the cheapest FX of any AU-accessible broker. 1 free withdrawal/month. Official pricing pages blocked automated fetches; cross-checked via current reviews.

name: Betashares Direct
asxFeeDesc: $0 brokerage on ASX ETFs and 400+ ASX shares
notes: Custodial (no HIN). ASX only. Transfer-out fee up to $9.50 per security; interest on uninvested cash retained by Betashares. Optional managed portfolios cost extra.

name: Totality (ex-Saxo)
asxFeeDesc: 0.08% (min $3) on the default custody account; CHESS/HIN account 0.10% (min $14.90)
monthlyFeeDesc: 0.12% p.a. custody fee on international holdings only
notes: Saxo Australia rebranded to Totality Wealth in April 2026. Default account is custodial; CHESS-sponsored account available at higher brokerage. Active-trader tier is cheaper.

name: IG Australia
asxFeeDesc: $0 brokerage on online ASX share and ETF trades
notes: Share trading account, not CFDs. Custodial — no HIN. The $0 US pricing requires the default instant-FX setting (0.7% spread is where they earn). Official pages blocked automated checks; cross-verified via two current comparison sites.

name: Shares by GO Markets
asxFeeDesc: $7.70 flat up to $100k; 0.05% above

promo.text: Free ASX brokerage period when you transfer an existing HIN to GO Markets
promo.conditions: Requires a full account transfer; exact free-trade count varies by transfer size — confirm with GO Markets before relying on it

notes: ASX-only share product, separate from GO's CFD business. Pricing cross-verified via review sites; CHESS status inferred from the HIN-transfer offer.

name: Westpac Share Trading
asxFeeDesc: $4.95 up to $1k; $9.95 up to $3k; $19.95 up to $10k; $29.95 up to $28k; 0.11% above (settling via Westpac Cash Investment Account)
usFeeDesc: Published on application; not on public pages
monthlyFeeDesc: $63.50/yr inactivity fee on the international account only
notes: CHESS-sponsored. Cheapest tiers require settlement via a Westpac Cash Investment Account; external settlement costs $29.95 or 0.29%. ANZ Share Investing and Macquarie Online Trading are closed to new retail customers and excluded.
